rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDMOND LOW NG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues have not been cleared since June 2024: (1) Notice of Hearing and Notice of Directions for Remote Appearances and Access have not been filed. (2) Proposed order must be submitted. LRSF 14.7. (3) Need clarification the remaining cash to be distributed to each of the five heirs. Appears 1/5 each is the correct share, not 1/10. (4) Need a separate provision of the omnibus clause which may need to break down between community property and separate property for any later discovered assets. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBERT SAMARIS SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 15, 2004
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #9, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Trustee has based the amount of required bond on the FMV of assets as of 12/31/22 (~$328k), despite alleging that the FMV as of March 2024 is ~$357k. 2) Trustee requests 1% guideline fees ($9,861), which generally includes the duty to prepare the accounting. A paralegal was paid $4,387.50 to prepare the accounting. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TESSIE L. HENRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No petition for final distribution nor report of status of administration with a request for additional time has been filed yet, as required by Probate Code Section 12200 and as ordered on 7/25/23. Neither the initial Petition for Probate filed on 4/10/23 nor the "Corrected" Petition for Probate of the Lost Will filed on 6/15/23 identified the trustee of the devisee trust and, if the trustee is the executor, did not identify all of the trust beneficiaries, as item 8 of the JC form clearly directs. This must be set forth in a declaration, signed and verified by the executor now. Notice was required to be given to all trust beneficiaries, if the trustee is the executor. [Probate Code Section 1208 and LRSF 14.18 C.2.] Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENIO A. VILLACARLOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/30/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The amended petition was not e-filed until 8/14/24, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. (2) Notice is defective if mailed before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. [LRSF 14.14 A.] Deadline is 10/21/24 for providing the assigned examiner a courtesy copies of any new papers. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (The examiner is aware that objections are pending e-filing. Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD HERRON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Decedent's will is lost. Petitioner avers that Probate Code 6124 does not apply. 2) Decedent's will was not witnessed. Petitioner avers that there is clear and convincing evidence under Probate Code 6110(c)(2). 3) Petitioner is receiving notice on behalf of Harold King (an intestate heir who is being disinherited in the lost will) under a power of attorney. She has also executed a consent to the petition, as his agent. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property And Directing Transfer Of Title Of Same To Trustee Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether sufficient notice has been given to Capital One. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WAI FOON MOY LEONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/17/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Who is the successor-in-interest to the post-deceased son, Francis M. Leong? [LRSF 14.18 D.] (2) If the petitioner is the administrator of his estate, this should have been set forth in item 8 of the petition, and all of his heirs must also be identified and must receive notice. (3) Please file a copy of the Letters issued to the personal representative of Francis Leong's estate. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 9/6/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
